background.description: Background transparency setting. Use transparent for images with no background, opaque for a solid background, or auto to let the model decide.

images.description: Input images for image editing, 1-16 entries. Each entry is base64-encoded (raw string or data:image/{png|jpeg|webp};base64,... URI).

output_format.description: Output format for the generated image

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the image to generate or edit
